div.head: The Albanian Minister (Konitza) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: With reference and as a sequel to my letter dated July 31, 1928,Not printed. I have the honor to inform you that I have now received instructions to sign both the Treaty of Arbitration and the Treaty of Conciliation, and also the Treaty for the Renunciation of war.See pp. 153 ff. I have the honor to enclose a copy of the documents appointing me a Plenipotentiary for the signing of these treaties. I have the Albanian texts ready.

My Government having asked me to pay as soon as possible a visit to Tirana in connection with some internal affairs, I shall wait for the signing of these treaties and I will take them with me and hope to bring the ratifications when I come back on December.
